370 LOEWE women's and men's shopping-grade loafers for fall/winter 2025. New arrival with cute round toe design, versatile to wear as slip-ons or with the heel down for a British style. Sizes: Women's 35-40 (custom size 40 not exchangeable), Men's 40-45 (custom size 45 not exchangeable).

Loewe x On Cloudtilt 1.0, a collaboration between Loewe and On, is a high-quality lightweight sports and leisure shoe for both men and women. This popular collaboration item is favored by many celebrities and is a trendy choice in the fashion world. It is comfortable to wear, with a soft and well-fitting sole that elongates the legs when worn. Conveniently designed without the need to tie shoelaces, it is versatile for both casual and athletic wear. Available in various sizes from 36 to 45, you can purchase your usual sports shoe size.
